summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Airline Reservation System. All core features working: Login, Register, Admin Dashboard (stats, flight CRUD, bookings view), Home page (flight search, listing), Seat Selection (interactive seat map, booking summary), Payment page (Stripe checkout), My Bookings page. Backend API tests: 13/13 passed.

minor.issue: Bookings for deleted flights show empty route (→) instead of cached flight info

issues: Bookings for deleted flights show '→' instead of flight route - consider caching flight info in booking document

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
JWT auth with httpOnly cookies implemented correctly
Brute force protection implemented (5 failed attempts = 15 min lockout)
Stripe integration uses emergentintegrations library correctly
Consider storing flight snapshot in booking document to preserve data when flights are deleted
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded on startup via seed_admin() function
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend_test.py cover all 13 API endpoints. Frontend flows tested: login, register, admin dashboard (create flight, view bookings), home page (flight listing), seat selection (interactive map), payment page, my bookings page. Stripe payment integration is real (not mocked) using emergentintegrations library.

features_tested.login_page: PASS - Admin login with admin@airline.com/admin123 works, redirects to home, shows Admin Dashboard link
features_tested.register_page: PASS - New user registration works, auto-login after registration
features_tested.home_page: PASS - Search form renders, flight listing shows created flights with Select Seats button
features_tested.admin_dashboard: PASS - Stats display (flights, bookings, revenue), flight creation form works, flights table shows data, bookings tab shows all bookings
features_tested.seat_selection: PASS - Interactive seat map loads, seats clickable, booking summary updates with price, Continue to Payment creates booking
features_tested.payment_page: PASS - Shows booking details, selected seats, total amount, Pay with Stripe button
features_tested.my_bookings: PASS - Shows user bookings with status, flight details, seats, amount, Complete Payment button for pending bookings
